sentences.text: Exploring a new city on foot is one of the best ways to experience its local culture.
The museum offers guided tours in multiple languages for international visitors.
It is always a good idea to learn a few basic phrases before traveling to a foreign country.
The street market was filled with colorful stalls selling handmade crafts and fresh produce.
Public transportation in Tokyo is incredibly efficient and punctual compared to many other major cities.
Local cuisine often tells you a lot about a region's history and the ingredients available there.
The hostel organized a walking tour that took us through some of the oldest neighborhoods in the city.
Traveling during the off-season can save you a significant amount of money on flights and accommodation.
